title: [MTR] Indian Railways Resources
description: Adds Indian Railways' tracks, bridges, catenaries, etc. stuff to enjoy with MTR mod.
body:
## **[MTR] Indian Railways Resources**

**Indian Railways Resources** is a detailed and realistic resource pack for the **Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)** mod, bringing the true look and atmosphere of **Indian Railways** into your Minecraft world.

This pack replaces existing rail types that can be selected through the **Brush Tool**, enabling players to design accurate and highly customized Indian-style railway networks.

---
![Vande Bharat on Metal Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89d52fb763191f9a46ed6ba3a95e55cfc3aeb9f.png)

Note: Trainset not included

---

### 🚆 **Features**

* **Broad Gauge Tracks** – Realistic Indian broad gauge tracks (1676mm) with accurate spacing and detailing.
* **Bridges & Structures** – Authentic bridge styles based on real Indian railway designs.
* **Gravel and Bases** – Proper ballast and base textures to enhance realism under tracks.
* **Catenary Systems** – Overhead electric poles and wires resembling Indian electrification setups.
* **Combinable Elements** – Mix and match bridges, tracks, and catenaries using the **MTR Brush Tool** to create unique and complex structures.

---

### ⚙️ **Installation Guidelines**

1. Download and install the Resource Pack.
2. Place this resource pack in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and enable **Indian Railways Resources** from the resource pack settings.
4. Use Brush Tool in right hand and right click the rail node to select rail types and apply Indian-style tracks and combinations.

---

### ⚠️ **Disclaimer**

This pack has been thoroughly tested and works fine with the latest MTR versions.
However, we are **not responsible for any issues, crashes, or conflicts** that may occur from improper installation, modification, or use of this resource pack.

---

### 🙏 **Special Thanks**

A huge thank-you to [@dewon2301](https://modrinth.com/user/L1PFHSB4) for generously sharing his **Metal Bridge model** and granting permission to edit and include it in this Resource Pack.
Your contribution helped this pack to be more complete and realistic!

---

### 💬 **Queries**

Join our **Discord server** through the right-side menu on this page for any support, feedback, or queries related to this resource pack.
